Sara Thomas
 Kochi, Kerala, India | +91 90011 22334 | sara.thomas.devops@protonmail.com | linkedin.com/in/sarathomas-cloud
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Cloud and DevOps Engineer with 6 years of experience designing scalable infrastructure, automating deployment
pipelines, and improving system reliability across AWS and Azure environments. Passionate about Infrastructure as
Code and reducing operational toil.

WORK EXPERIENCE
Senior DevOps Engineer — Cirrus Cloud Systems
Bengaluru, India | Jan 2022 – Present
 Migrated on-premise infrastructure to AWS using Terraform, reducing infra provisioning time by 70%.
 Implemented Kubernetes-based microservices architecture supporting 200+ deployments per month.
 Built monitoring and alerting with Prometheus and Grafana, reducing mean time to detect incidents by 50%.
 Designed disaster recovery procedures that reduced potential downtime from 4 hours to under 20 minutes.
DevOps Engineer — Wavecrest Infotech
Kochi, India | Jun 2019 – Dec 2021
 Automated CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins for 15+ microservices, cutting release cycle time by 60%.
 Managed containerized deployments with Docker and Kubernetes across staging and production.
 Implemented centralized logging using the ELK stack, improving root-cause analysis speed.
